note: portfolio-v7 is an Astro application, not a component library — no Storybook, no dist/ of reusable components, private (non-published) package. The standard package/storybook converter has nothing to bundle. Per the user's choice (2026-07-09) this is a hand-authored sync of design tokens + reusable CSS patterns (NOT a component bundle), so claude.ai/design produces designs that are 1:1 with the site.

source.patterns: src/styles/global.css (@layer base: .lead, .small-heading, .badge, .quiet-link, focus ring, body links, .prose)
